final:
module matrix_filter(
    input [7:0] pixel00, pixel01, pixel02,
    input [7:0] pixel10, pixel11, pixel12,
    input [7:0] pixel20, pixel21, pixel22,
    output [11:0] output_sum
);

  wire _n01 = pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[0] ^ pixel22[0];
  wire _c01 = pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[0] & pixel22[0];
  wire _n02 = pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[1] ^ pixel22[1] ^ _c01;
  wire _c02 = (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[1] & pixel22[1]) | (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[1] & _c01) | (pixel22[1] & _c01);
  wire _n03 = pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[2] ^ pixel22[2] ^ _c02;
  wire _c03 = (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[2] & pixel22[2]) | (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[2] & _c02) | (pixel22[2] & _c02);
  wire _n04 = pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[3] ^ pixel22[3] ^ _c03;
  wire _c04 = (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[3] & pixel22[3]) | (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                    pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                    pixel20 + pixel21[3] & _c03) | (pixel22[3] & _c03);
  assign output_sum = {_n01, _n02, _n03, _n04};

endmodule

module dot_product (
    input [4:0] vector_a,
    input [4:0] vector_b,
    output [9:0] dot_product_out
);
      wire _n01 = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][0] ^ vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][0];
  wire _c01 = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][0] & vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][0];
  wire _n02 = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][1] ^ vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][1] ^ _c01;
  wire _c02 = (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][1] & vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][1]) | (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][1] & _c01) | (vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][1] & _c01);
  wire _n03 = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][2] ^ vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][2] ^ _c02;
  wire _c03 = (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][2] & vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][2]) | (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][2] & _c02) | (vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][2] & _c02);
  wire _n04 = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][3] ^ vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][3] ^ _c03;
  wire _c04 = (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][3] & vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][3]) | (vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3][3] & _c03) | (vector_a[4]*vector_b[4][3] & _c03);
  assign dot_product_out = {_n01, _n02, _n03, _n04};
endmodule
